trigger.Name: trKraiPlaceSecret
trigger.script:
local gunlist = {"specter01","pktu01","storm01","fly01"} local len = getn(gunlist)
for i=1,4 do --println("step"..i.."succesful") CreateBoxWithAffixGun(CVector(getPos("SecretPlace"..i.."_loc")), gunlist[exrandom(len)], random(0,2)) end trigger:Deactivate()
